title: AQ Canon-Compiler Input Spec
description: Draft 2020-12 schema for the input manifest consumed by scripts/governance/aq-canon-compiler.py. A canon spec lists one or more frozen JSON Schema documents under config/schemas/ to compile into a typed client interface, API markdown, and a dashboard view-model stub. This document validates the manifest itself, not the referenced target schemas — each referenced schema is separately checked with jsonschema.Draft202012Validator.check_schema() before compilation, giving fail-closed rejection of malformed manifests and malformed target schemas alike.

name.description: Deterministic identifier used as the output artifact stem (e.g. <name>.client.ts, <name>.api.md, <name>.viewmodel.js).

schema_path.description: Repo-root-relative path to the frozen JSON/YAML schema to compile. Must live under config/schemas/.
